TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nan'ao mki sku Yilan. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 716.07 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 637.26 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 65.15 km²), 4,807 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,498 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,487 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Nan'ao ays psgayun 7 ru 13 alang. 13 alang hani ga, Tpihan , K'babaw , Pyahaw , Ryohen , Buta , K'yang , Kmuyaw , Guguc , Kngungu , Hagaparis , Kinus , B'bukeykay , Kb'bu .
S.PHON: nanʔao mki s~ɕku jilan. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na tajan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu nanʔao ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, tpiħan , kʔβaβaw , pjaħaw , rjoħen , βuta , kʔjaŋ , kmujaw , ɣuɣuʦ~ʨ , kŋuŋu , ħaɣaparis~ɕ , kinus~ɕ , βʔβukejkaj , kβʔβu .
S.FORM: Nan'ao mki sku Yilan. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 716.07 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 637.26 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 65.15 km²), 4,807 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,498 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,487 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Tayan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Nan'ao ays psgayun 7 ru 13 alang. 13 alang hani ga, Tpihan , K'babaw , Pyahaw , Ryohen , Buta , K'yang , Kmuyaw , Guguc , Kngungu , Hagaparis , Kinus , B'bukeykay , Kb'bu .
S.PHON: nanʔao mki s~ɕku jilan. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na tajan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu nanʔao ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, tpiħan , kʔβaβaw , pjaħaw , rjoħen , βuta , kʔjaŋ , kmujaw , ɣuɣuʦ~ʨ , kŋuŋu , ħaɣaparis~ɕ , kinus~ɕ , βʔβukejkaj , kβʔβu .
